description: Source code for MainViewModel class in an Android application, responsible for managing authentication states, user actions like login, lock, unlock, logout, and making protected API calls. It interacts with AuthManager, ApiClient, and maintains UI state via StateFlow.

classes.name: MainViewModel
classes.description: ViewModel class that manages user authentication flow, session state, and API interactions, exposing LiveData for UI binding.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs user login with provided username and password, interacts with AuthManager and ApiClient.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the current session, requiring re-authentication.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the session after successful biometric/credential verification.

methods.name: callProtected
methods.description: Calls a protected resource via ApiClient, demonstrating network call and error handling.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Logs out the user, clearing tokens and resetting state.

methods.name: appendLog
methods.description: Appends a timestamped message to the status log, maintaining a maximum of 200 entries.
